primary_blocker: Two-person decision — absent partner is hidden blocker
key_intelligence: Two-person household decision (certainty-seeker). Both parties must be aligned. The person not on the call is a hidden blocker — follow-up materials must be clear enough for independent review. Emphasise income security not ceiling. Worst-month figures are the persuasion lever.
top_objections: Partner needs to agree before committing
What does income look like in the quieter months?
what_resonated: Income projection showing all months net positive vs LTL
lead_language: I need to discuss it with [partner]
What does the quiet season look like?
